title: Extensions of Credit by Federal Reserve Banks
abstract: The Board invites public comment on proposed amendments to Regulation A (Extensions of Credit by Federal Reserve Banks) that would implement sections 1101 and 1103 of the Dodd-Frank Wall Street Reform and Consumer Protection Act of 2010 (the "Dodd-Frank Act"). These provisions of the Dodd-Frank Act amend the emergency lending authority of the Federal Reserve Banks under section 13(3) of the Federal Reserve Act (the "FRA"), and require the Board, in consultation with the Secretary of the Treasury
action: Notice of proposed rulemaking; request for public comment.
issuing_agency: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
